title: zosterophyllanthos gonioglossus
intro: Zosterophyllanthos gonioglossus, also known as the 'Forked Tongue Plant', is a type of ancient plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae. The medicinal properties of this plant are derived from its roots and leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The health benefits of Zosterophyllanthos gonioglossus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
